jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Divi's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Divi's Laboratories in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Divi's Laboratories:
Divi's Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
